expected_deltas.content: 90 days of inactivity may result in an account being flagged for review, but is not a guaranteed trigger
expected_deltas.source_span: Users who haven't logged in for 90 days may have their accounts flagged for review.
expected_deltas.note: 'May' plus the existence of a second, independent flagging rule (unusual access patterns) means inactivity alone isn't established as a sufficient cause. A pipeline should not extract this as unconditional causation.

expected_deltas.content: Flagging changes review priority but does not restrict account functionality
expected_deltas.source_span: Flagging does not itself restrict any account functionality; it only changes the internal review priority assigned to that account.
expected_deltas.note: Tests whether the pipeline correctly extracts a NEGATIVE causal claim (X does NOT cause Y) instead of assuming flagging implies some form of restriction.
